items.heading: Getting Started with AI at SGM
items.summary: An introductory guide covering what AI tools are available, how to access them, and best practices for getting started. Includes tips on prompt writing and when to use which tool.

items.heading: Prompt Engineering Best Practices
items.summary: Learn the C.R.A.F.T. framework and other techniques for writing effective AI prompts. Covers common mistakes, advanced strategies, and real examples from the SGM team.

items.heading: AI Tools Update — March 2026
items.summary: This month we added 3 new custom GPTs for the GRT and PPC teams. See what's new and how to start using them in your daily workflow.

items.heading: Claude Code Workshop Recording
items.summary: Recording and slides from the live Claude Code workshop held on 28th February. Covers setup, basic commands, and building your first automated workflow.
